codemirror.js + codemirror.css vendored verbatim from the codemirror npm
package, version 5.65.18 (lib/codemirror.js, lib/codemirror.css), MIT license
(see LICENSE alongside). Consumed only by studio.html's source ⇄ .phos review
popup. To re-vendor: npm install codemirror@5.65.18, copy the two lib/ files
plus LICENSE here, npm uninstall codemirror.
